# imgui

[Dear ImGui](https://github.com/ocornut/imgui) immediate-mode UI used for the entire application.

## Used sources (compiled)

- `imgui.cpp`, `imgui_draw.cpp`, `imgui_tables.cpp`, `imgui_widgets.cpp`
- `imgui_impl_win32.cpp`, `imgui_impl_dx9.cpp`
- Demo file `imgui_demo.cpp` is included for debug widgets (optional in release builds)

Include path: `third_party/imgui`
